subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-06-23
subcodes.first_line: The material progress of Europe is approaching its zenith. Everything that reaches its zenith undoubtedly begins to decline.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ترقیات مادیه اروپا بحد یقف می رسد هر امریکه بحد یقف رسید لابد تدنی نماید
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
